academic_requirements: OUT OF SCOPE: This single-cycle degree is taught in Italian, not English. Admission is via the Italian national restricted-access procedure for Medicine and Surgery (from A.Y. 2025/2026 a common national open 'filter' first semester applies, after which a national ranking based on first-semester results determines who continues). Available places at UniGe are stated on the official page as 325 for EU and 5 for non-EU candidates. Italian-qualification requirements and the national test apply.
language_requirements: Italian language proficiency required (instruction is in Italian). No English-taught version of Medicine and Surgery exists at UniGe; therefore the standard English/B2 requirements for the English catalogue do not apply.
entry_exam_or_test: National admission test / common national filter semester (Italian system). Not an English-taught IMAT programme. Candidates register on Universitaly within nationally set deadlines. [uncertain]
application_deadline_eu: Set by the Italian national procedure (announced on Universitaly / UniGe website). Not aligned with the UniGeApply English-master windows. [uncertain]
application_deadline_non_eu: Set by the Italian national procedure for the 5 non-EU places; announced on Universitaly / UniGe. [uncertain]
required_documents: Governed by the Italian national restricted-access enrolment procedure (Universitaly registration, valid ID, qualification documents). Not the UniGeApply English-master pre-evaluation document set. [uncertain]
source_quotes: From https://corsi.unige.it/en/corsi/11887 (official UniGe programme page): the course information states 'Language: Italian' and lists an 'Admission test' with available places EU 325 / Non-EU 5, with a new common national filter semester from 2025/2026. The parallel page https://corsi.unige.it/en/corsi/8745 (Medicine and Surgery, LM-41) likewise states 'Language: Italian'. No English-taught Medicine and Surgery appears in the official English course catalogue (https://corsi.unige.it/en/corsi/lingua/en).
uncertainty_notes: OUT OF SCOPE for the ItalyPath English-programme dataset. Verified against two official UniGe course pages (codes 11887 and 8745): both Medicine and Surgery degrees at UniGe are taught in Italian (LM-41). There is NO English-taught (IMAT-based) Medicine and Surgery at the University of Genoa, and it is absent from the official English course catalogue. The older draft entry listing it as an English single-cycle programme is incorrect and this item should be dropped from the English dataset. Admission/test/deadline/document fields could not be (and need not be) confirmed because the programme is out of scope; they follow the Italian national procedure rather than UniGeApply.
